chunks.title: David's Last Words
chunks.reason: A cohesive poetic speech by David describing his divine inspiration and the contrast between the righteous and the wicked.

chunks.title: The First Three Mighty Men
chunks.reason: A narrative section detailing the heroic deeds of Josheb-basshebeth, Eleazar, and Shammah.

chunks.title: The Water of Bethlehem
chunks.reason: A complete narrative account of the three mighty men fetching water for David and his reaction to it.

chunks.title: Abishai and Benaiah
chunks.reason: Narrative descriptions of the exploits of Abishai and Benaiah, highlighting their status among the warriors.

chunks.title: List of the Thirty Mighty Men
chunks.reason: A continuous catalog listing the names and origins of the remaining warriors to complete the roster.
